short_text: Kumara to van Meekeren, Lbw!! Quick yorker, bang in the blockhole, and hitting Meekeren right on the front leg's toe. It
full_text: Kumara to van Meekeren, Lbw!! Quick yorker, bang in the blockhole, and hitting Meekeren right on the front leg's toe. It would clearly have gone down leg, but alas, the Dutch haven't left him any reviews. Not that it would've made much of a difference though, it's been a serious carnage.

short_text: Kumara to van Meekeren, no run, back of a length, outside off, flying over the flashy cut
full_text: Kumara to van Meekeren, no run, back of a length, outside off, flying over the flashy cut

short_text: Kumara to van Meekeren, no run, quite full, on off, pushed out to mid-off
full_text: Kumara to van Meekeren, no run, quite full, on off, pushed out to mid-off

short_text: Kumara to Brandon Glover, Caught by Kusal Perera!! Feathers it through. Glover arches back, looks to punch away from his
full_text: Kumara to Brandon Glover, Caught by Kusal Perera!! Feathers it through. Glover arches back, looks to punch away from his body, typically tail-ender-like, with no feet whatsoever. The ball though kisses the outside-edge ..

short_text: Kumara to Brandon Glover, no run, a leg-cleared wafty drive, without connection
full_text: Kumara to Brandon Glover, no run, a leg-cleared wafty drive, without connection

short_text: Kumara to Scott Edwards, Lbw!! The cookie crumbles further. A full, straight delivery on middle-stump, past the flick an
full_text: Kumara to Scott Edwards, Lbw!! The cookie crumbles further. A full, straight delivery on middle-stump, past the flick and three reds on another of Netherlands' burnt review. There were two noises though, but it's off Edwards' bat hitting the pad.

short_text: Hasaranga to Fred Klaassen, no run, back-footed punch, straight to cover
full_text: Hasaranga to Fred Klaassen, no run, back-footed punch, straight to cover

short_text: Hasaranga to Fred Klaassen, no run, more on off, leaning straight-batted block back
full_text: Hasaranga to Fred Klaassen, no run, more on off, leaning straight-batted block back

short_text: Hasaranga to Fred Klaassen, no run, a wide-of-the-crease googly, with Klaassen getting an inside-edge on his forward def
full_text: Hasaranga to Fred Klaassen, no run, a wide-of-the-crease googly, with Klaassen getting an inside-edge on his forward defence to keep it out

short_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, 1 run, leg-break, full, outside off, dragged sweep to deep square leg
full_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, 1 run, leg-break, full, outside off, dragged sweep to deep square leg

short_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, no run, steps out, and defends it back down the pitch
full_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, no run, steps out, and defends it back down the pitch

short_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, no run, reveses, with a checked sweep off the under-edge to slip, on the bounce
full_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, no run, reveses, with a checked sweep off the under-edge to slip, on the bounce

short_text: Kumara to Scott Edwards, leg byes, 1 run, : Seam-up, angling in, and beating Edwards for pace as he misses the flick and
full_text: Kumara to Scott Edwards, leg byes, 1 run, : Seam-up, angling in, and beating Edwards for pace as he misses the flick and gets struck on the front pad. But the , with the trajectory going further down

short_text: Kumara to Fred Klaassen, 1 run, 106kph, slower back of a length off-cutter, glanced behind square
full_text: Kumara to Fred Klaassen, 1 run, 106kph, slower back of a length off-cutter, glanced behind square

short_text: Kumara to Fred Klaassen, no run, . Another quick, sharp bumper. Klaassen's already deep in his crease, awkwardly half-du
full_text: Kumara to Fred Klaassen, no run, . Another quick, sharp bumper. Klaassen's already deep in his crease, awkwardly half-ducking

short_text: Kumara to Fred Klaassen, no run, full toss, on the stumps, and tentatively defended
full_text: Kumara to Fred Klaassen, no run, full toss, on the stumps, and tentatively defended

short_text: Kumara to Scott Edwards, leg byes, 1 run, . Sharp bouncer, and Edwards is caught in the firing line, looking away to get
full_text: Kumara to Scott Edwards, leg byes, 1 run, . Sharp bouncer, and Edwards is caught in the firing line, looking away to get hit flush on the badge. They pocket the ricochet though, with the ball rolling away to third man.

short_text: Kumara to Scott Edwards, no run, pretty wide outside off, Edwards throws his bat out, without connection
full_text: Kumara to Scott Edwards, no run, pretty wide outside off, Edwards throws his bat out, without connection

short_text: Hasaranga to Seelaar, Lbw!! Plumb. A googly, skidding through, with Seelaar merely going through with the cluelessness t
full_text: Hasaranga to Seelaar, Lbw!! Plumb. A googly, skidding through, with Seelaar merely going through with the cluelessness that the rest of his side has shown. he decides to play it off the back foot, and is clearly late in bringing the bat down to get struck in front of middle.

short_text: Hasaranga to Seelaar, no run, fuller, on the stumps, knocked back down the pitch
full_text: Hasaranga to Seelaar, no run, fuller, on the stumps, knocked back down the pitch

short_text: Hasaranga to Seelaar, no run, googly. Gets a stride in front in defence, inside-edging it onto himself
full_text: Hasaranga to Seelaar, no run, googly. Gets a stride in front in defence, inside-edging it onto himself

short_text: Hasaranga to Seelaar, 2 runs, shorter, and a back-footed nudge through mid-wicket
full_text: Hasaranga to Seelaar, 2 runs, shorter, and a back-footed nudge through mid-wicket

short_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, 1 run, the normal leg-break, taking it from well outside off to sweep away to backward squar
full_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, 1 run, the normal leg-break, taking it from well outside off to sweep away to backward square leg

short_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, no run, tries reverse-sweeping, and gloves it into the ground, only as far as the keeper
full_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, no run, tries reverse-sweeping, and gloves it into the ground, only as far as the keeper

short_text: Chameera to Seelaar, no run, another short one, but Seelaar's happy to sway out. Phew, it's been some powerplay!
full_text: Chameera to Seelaar, no run, another short one, but Seelaar's happy to sway out. Phew, it's been some powerplay!

short_text: Chameera to van der Merwe, Caught by Kusal Perera!! : A quick, sharp short one, which van der Merwe looks to arch back a
full_text: Chameera to van der Merwe, Caught by Kusal Perera!! : A quick, sharp short one, which van der Merwe looks to arch back and upper-cut. He misses. There isn't much of an appeal either. But then they review, and UltraEdge finds a tiny spike as the ball goes past the toe-end.

short_text: Chameera to van der Merwe, no run, a slower one, beating Merwe's entirely foxed push forward
full_text: Chameera to van der Merwe, no run, a slower one, beating Merwe's entirely foxed push forward

short_text: Chameera to van der Merwe, no run, pitched up, punched neatly but straight to cover
full_text: Chameera to van der Merwe, no run, pitched up, punched neatly but straight to cover

short_text: Chameera to Scott Edwards, 1 run, length, just outside off, and an open-faced dab to third man
full_text: Chameera to Scott Edwards, 1 run, length, just outside off, and an open-faced dab to third man

short_text: Chameera to Scott Edwards, , skidding into the legs, and some much needed runs. Edwards flicks it alright, in front of s
full_text: Chameera to Scott Edwards, , skidding into the legs, and some much needed runs. Edwards flicks it alright, in front of square

short_text: Hasaranga to Bas de Leede, Lbw!! It's getting ugly. It's too sticky a spin web for Netherlands to deal with. And Leede -
full_text: Hasaranga to Bas de Leede, Lbw!! It's getting ugly. It's too sticky a spin web for Netherlands to deal with. And Leede - like most others - plays down the wrong line, gets struck on the front pad, and is happy to walk off. Well, the impact did look a touch dodgy, perhaps slightly outside off, but no, such has been the scarring.

short_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, 1 run, sweeps now, behind square leg
full_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, 1 run, sweeps now, behind square leg

short_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, no run, googly, with Edwards leaning out, playing outside the line with the ball spinning in
full_text: Hasaranga to Scott Edwards, no run, googly, with Edwards leaning out, playing outside the line with the ball spinning in and hitting him low on the front pad. ..

short_text: Hasaranga to Ackermann, Lbw!! It's the slider, and Ackermann's played for the leg-break, defending outside the line, onl
full_text: Hasaranga to Ackermann, Lbw!! It's the slider, and Ackermann's played for the leg-break, defending outside the line, only to be struck plumb in front of middle. Oh, and well, as if things weren't bad enough already for Netherlands, he's burnt a review as well.

short_text: Hasaranga to Ackermann, , nails the sweep. Has a huge forward stretch, getting right to the pitch of this to absolutely
full_text: Hasaranga to Ackermann, , nails the sweep. Has a huge forward stretch, getting right to the pitch of this to absolutely pump this through square leg

short_text: Hasaranga to Bas de Leede, leg byes, 1 run, , but with Leede stepping out and shuffling across his stumps, he's done wel
full_text: Hasaranga to Bas de Leede, leg byes, 1 run, , but with Leede stepping out and shuffling across his stumps, he's done well to make the impact outside off, as the ball spins in and rolls off the front pad into square leg

short_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, back of a length in-skidder, and a hurried nudge-out to leg
full_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, back of a length in-skidder, and a hurried nudge-out to leg

short_text: Kumara to Ackermann, , 145kph, misses his length and feeds it in the slot, with Ackermann once again making room and get
full_text: Kumara to Ackermann, , 145kph, misses his length and feeds it in the slot, with Ackermann once again making room and getting forward with his freed-up arms to smoke it into the sightscreen

short_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, full, just outside off, Ackermann clears his front leg out, trying to force a drive, but ca
full_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, full, just outside off, Ackermann clears his front leg out, trying to force a drive, but can only dig it out off the toe-end to cover

short_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, 141kph, opens his bat face a touch, steering his forward block towards cover-point
full_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, 141kph, opens his bat face a touch, steering his forward block towards cover-point

short_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, 144kph, nails the yorker now, and Ackermann can only squeeze it out, to point
full_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, 144kph, nails the yorker now, and Ackermann can only squeeze it out, to point

short_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, 146kph, full, on off, forward defence
full_text: Kumara to Ackermann, no run, 146kph, full, on off, forward defence

short_text: M Theekshana to Bas de Leede, no run, . Full, outside off, spinning away, past a wafty drive
full_text: M Theekshana to Bas de Leede, no run, . Full, outside off, spinning away, past a wafty drive

short_text: M Theekshana to Myburgh, Bowled!! And the Dutch continue to crumble. Another carrom ball, something Myburgh tries pullin
full_text: M Theekshana to Myburgh, Bowled!! And the Dutch continue to crumble. Another carrom ball, something Myburgh tries pulling across the line off his back foot, only for the ball to stay low, and knock middle-stump out yet again.

short_text: M Theekshana to Ackermann, 1 run, fuller, on off, Ackermann leans across to flick it through square leg
full_text: M Theekshana to Ackermann, 1 run, fuller, on off, Ackermann leans across to flick it through square leg

short_text: M Theekshana to Ben Cooper, Bowled!! Through him. Cooper - cluelessly - charges out, and plays all around it. Theekshana
full_text: M Theekshana to Ben Cooper, Bowled!! Through him. Cooper - cluelessly - charges out, and plays all around it. Theekshana's pushed through a sneaky carrom ball this time, drifting away at first past the outside-edge and then spinning back in to rattle the middle-stump.

short_text: M Theekshana to Myburgh, 1 run, full, off-break, sliced past cover
full_text: M Theekshana to Myburgh, 1 run, full, off-break, sliced past cover

short_text: M Theekshana to Ben Cooper, 1 run, a short googly to start with, whipped round the corner off the back foot
full_text: M Theekshana to Ben Cooper, 1 run, a short googly to start with, whipped round the corner off the back foot

short_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, leg byes, 1 run, leg-lined, beating Cooper for pace once again as he tries to glance, sneaking i
full_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, leg byes, 1 run, leg-lined, beating Cooper for pace once again as he tries to glance, sneaking in a single in the end as the ball rolls off his thighs

short_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, , 139kph, sharp short one cramping him for room on the leg-side. Cooper's absolutely in no posit
full_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, , 139kph, sharp short one cramping him for room on the leg-side. Cooper's absolutely in no position to react, desperately trying to fend away, as the ball thuds his chest guard and trickles away really fine

short_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, , 146kph, another flashy slap, this time with flying past off-stump, and under the diving keeper
full_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, , 146kph, another flashy slap, this time with flying past off-stump, and under the diving keeper

short_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, no run, fuller, going across, Cooper flays expansively, and misses
full_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, no run, fuller, going across, Cooper flays expansively, and misses

short_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, no run, 144kph, . Perfect channel just outside off, nipping in and staying low as Cooper half-po
full_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, no run, 144kph, . Perfect channel just outside off, nipping in and staying low as Cooper half-pokes

short_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, no run, full, on off, leaning forward drive to short cover
full_text: Chameera to Ben Cooper, no run, full, on off, leaning forward drive to short cover

short_text: Karunaratne to Myburgh, no run, swings back in, on a fifth-stump line as Myburgh throws his bat out to cut, getting cram
full_text: Karunaratne to Myburgh, no run, swings back in, on a fifth-stump line as Myburgh throws his bat out to cut, getting cramped and beaten on the inside-edge

short_text: Karunaratne to Myburgh, , slapped over mid-off. It's full, outside off, and Myburgh's quick to get under the length, swi
full_text: Karunaratne to Myburgh, , slapped over mid-off. It's full, outside off, and Myburgh's quick to get under the length, swinging hard. It doesn't quite come off the middle, but it's meaty enough

short_text: Karunaratne to Myburgh, , quite a wild welcome -- full, way, way outside off
full_text: Karunaratne to Myburgh, , quite a wild welcome -- full, way, way outside off

short_text: Karunaratne to Max ODowd, Max ODowd Run Out!! Direct hit. Casual running. And a deadend. O'Dowd taps it in front of cove
full_text: Karunaratne to Max ODowd, Max ODowd Run Out!! Direct hit. Casual running. And a deadend. O'Dowd taps it in front of cover and sets off, but Shanaka is quick to swoop in and catch him a foot short at the non-striker's.

short_text: Karunaratne to Max ODowd, no run, jags back in off the deck, on a good length, on middle, with a thick inside-edge off O
full_text: Karunaratne to Max ODowd, no run, jags back in off the deck, on a good length, on middle, with a thick inside-edge off O'Dowd's glance onto his knee roll

short_text: Karunaratne to Max ODowd, 2 runs, leg-lined, tucked away behind square and a quick second one pinched
full_text: Karunaratne to Max ODowd, 2 runs, leg-lined, tucked away behind square and a quick second one pinched

short_text: Karunaratne to Myburgh, byes, 1 run, , but the umpire reckons it's gone right through bat and pad. Myburgh looks to flic
full_text: Karunaratne to Myburgh, byes, 1 run, , but the umpire reckons it's gone right through bat and pad. Myburgh looks to flick, and the ball in fact has kissed the outside of the front pad, but no,

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Avishka Fernando, 1 run, short of length into the body, glances it to fine leg to wrap up the shellacki
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Avishka Fernando, 1 run, short of length into the body, glances it to fine leg to wrap up the shellacking. while Netherlands bow out of the tournament with nothing to show

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, 2 runs, clips wide of fine leg
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, 2 runs, clips wide of fine leg

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, back of a length on middle, Perera turns it to midwicket
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, back of a length on middle, Perera turns it to midwicket

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, good length outside off, slapped to cover
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, good length outside off, slapped to cover

full_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, 1 run, good length outside off, Fernando taps it through the covers

short_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, , short outside off, another wide
full_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, , short outside off, another wide

short_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, no run, short of length outside off, left alone
full_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, no run, short of length outside off, left alone

short_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, no run, full on middle, flicked to midwicket
full_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, no run, full on middle, flicked to midwicket

short_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, , way too wide outside off, left alone
full_text: Brandon Glover to Avishka Fernando, , way too wide outside off, left alone

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , short of length outside off, this time Perera slaps it through extra cover. Just six awa
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , short of length outside off, this time Perera slaps it through extra cover. Just six away now

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , short of length outside off, Perera swats it over midwicket. Timing not great but enough
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , short of length outside off, Perera swats it over midwicket. Timing not great but enough to crawl into the ropes after clearing the field

short_text: van Meekeren to Asalanka, Caught by Fred Klaassen!! High on the bat as Asalanka looks to loft down the ground. Mid-off a
full_text: van Meekeren to Asalanka, Caught by Fred Klaassen!! High on the bat as Asalanka looks to loft down the ground. Mid-off and mid-on both in the ring so he fancied it. But it was a length ball that skidded on, rushing him a touch as well as climbing more than he expected. Balloons off the splice to mid-on.

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, 1 run, back of a length on off, punches to mid-off
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, 1 run, back of a length on off, punches to mid-off

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , short and wide, slapped over cover
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , short and wide, slapped over cover

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, no run, good length outside off, Perera drives back to the bowler
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, no run, good length outside off, Perera drives back to the bowler

short_text: Brandon Glover to Asalanka, no run, length ball across off, Asalanka swings and misses
full_text: Brandon Glover to Asalanka, no run, length ball across off, Asalanka swings and misses

short_text: Brandon Glover to Asalanka, no run, the short ball gets stuck in the pitch. Asalanka's through with the pull too early a
full_text: Brandon Glover to Asalanka, no run, the short ball gets stuck in the pitch. Asalanka's through with the pull too early and is hit flush on the grille. Physio is out to check on him. He seems fine

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, 1 run, short of length outside off, Perera flat-bats in front of mid-off for a quick sin
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, 1 run, short of length outside off, Perera flat-bats in front of mid-off for a quick single

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, short of length across off, not enough room for Perera who's beaten on the cut
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, short of length across off, not enough room for Perera who's beaten on the cut

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, , short into the body, Perera swivels across and pulls it past short fine
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, , short into the body, Perera swivels across and pulls it past short fine

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, back of a length on leg, beats Perera on the clip and hits the top of the pad
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, back of a length on leg, beats Perera on the clip and hits the top of the pad

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, no run, back of a length down leg, Asalanka misses out on the glance. No wide signalled, so t
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, no run, back of a length down leg, Asalanka misses out on the glance. No wide signalled, so the umpire thinks it brushed the thigh. . No bat, just thigh pad

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Kusal Perera, 1 run, tucks it through square leg
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Kusal Perera, 1 run, tucks it through square leg

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, 1 run, takes on the short ball and mistimes the pull in the air. It falls in between the fiel
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, 1 run, takes on the short ball and mistimes the pull in the air. It falls in between the fielder running back and the fielder running in

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, no run, sways out of the way of this short ball
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, no run, sways out of the way of this short ball

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, no run, back of a length on middle and leg, slower ball, Asalanka nudges it to midwicket
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, no run, back of a length on middle and leg, slower ball, Asalanka nudges it to midwicket

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, , length ball on off, Asalanka works it wide of short fine. Runs away for four after beating
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Asalanka, , length ball on off, Asalanka works it wide of short fine. Runs away for four after beating the fielder

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, no run, back of a length on off, blocked in front of backward point
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, no run, back of a length on off, blocked in front of backward point

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , the bouncer's too high, called wide
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , the bouncer's too high, called wide

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, no run, full and wide, Perera smashes it to mid-off
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, no run, full and wide, Perera smashes it to mid-off

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , pitched up on off, Perera crunches it straight back down the ground. Beautifully timed
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, , pitched up on off, Perera crunches it straight back down the ground. Beautifully timed

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, no run, short ball outside off, loops over Perera's attempted pull
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, no run, short ball outside off, loops over Perera's attempted pull

short_text: van Meekeren to Asalanka, 1 run, full outside off, Asalanka goes hard on the drive and mistimes it wide of cover who mak
full_text: van Meekeren to Asalanka, 1 run, full outside off, Asalanka goes hard on the drive and mistimes it wide of cover who makes a half-stop

short_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, 1 run, full and wide, Perera reaches out and gets it off the toe-end to deep third
full_text: van Meekeren to Kusal Perera, 1 run, full and wide, Perera reaches out and gets it off the toe-end to deep third

short_text: Brandon Glover to Asalanka, no run, short of length on off, blocked into the off-side
full_text: Brandon Glover to Asalanka, no run, short of length on off, blocked into the off-side

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, 1 run, back of a length on leg, Perera tucks it through square leg
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, 1 run, back of a length on leg, Perera tucks it through square leg

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, pushes to cover
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, pushes to cover

short_text: Brandon Glover to Nissanka, Caught by van Meekeren!! Down the pitch for a lofted shot. Has miscued it off the toe-end. M
full_text: Brandon Glover to Nissanka, Caught by van Meekeren!! Down the pitch for a lofted shot. Has miscued it off the toe-end. Mid-on settles under the skier and takes it comfortably. So Netherlands have struck early. They aren't going to win this one but it's a wicket for Glover.

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, 1 run, short of length across off, Perera doesn't have much room as he looks to slap it
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, 1 run, short of length across off, Perera doesn't have much room as he looks to slap it away. Mistimes it in front of mid-off. Takes a quick single

short_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, pitched up on middle and leg, Perera knocks it to mid-on
full_text: Brandon Glover to Kusal Perera, no run, pitched up on middle and leg, Perera knocks it to mid-on

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Nissanka, no run, good length across off, goes with the angle and beats the outside edge. Top over. Got
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Nissanka, no run, good length across off, goes with the angle and beats the outside edge. Top over. Got the ball to swing, planted the doubt and almost had the edge off the last ball with one slanting across

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Nissanka, no run, advances down, the length is on the shorter side and Nissanka taps it to backward poi
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Nissanka, no run, advances down, the length is on the shorter side and Nissanka taps it to backward point

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Nissanka, no run, full on middle, swings sharply back into Nissanka. He gets an inside edge on pad
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Nissanka, no run, full on middle, swings sharply back into Nissanka. He gets an inside edge on pad

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Kusal Perera, 1 run, full on leg, late outswing, and Perera gets a leading edge as he looks to flick. G
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Kusal Perera, 1 run, full on leg, late outswing, and Perera gets a leading edge as he looks to flick. Goes in the air and in the gap through cover

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Kusal Perera, , short and wide, Perera throws his hands at it and it runs away off the toe-end past sho
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Kusal Perera, , short and wide, Perera throws his hands at it and it runs away off the toe-end past short third

short_text: Fred Klaassen to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, back of a length on leg, strikes Nissanka on the thigh as he looks to clip i
full_text: Fred Klaassen to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, back of a length on leg, strikes Nissanka on the thigh as he looks to clip it away
